author: agustif
claim: Review packet construction is duplicated across three independent pipelines with visible schema/policy drift, bypassing a canonical packet builder
reason: All four claims are technically accurate at the cited paths against snapshot 6eb2065. Three independent packet construction flows (prepare.py, batch/orchestrator.py, external.py) duplicate the same logic, bypassing the canonical builder in packet/build.py. Two concrete drift instances are confirmed: max_files_per_batch and config redaction are both missing from external.py.
references: desloppify/app/commands/review/packet/build.py:53-80 (canonical builder that is bypassed by all three flows)
caveats: The canonical builder in packet/build.py does include max_files_per_batch, confirming the submitter's claim that a correct central path exists but is bypassed
Line numbers in the submission are approximate but substantively accurate — the drift is real and confirmed
